Bash(cd Z:/arxiv_grader && python -c "
from scrapers import SCRAPERS
import feedparser

scraper = SCRAPERS['plos']\(\)
feed = feedparser.parse\('http://feeds.plos.org/ploscompbiol/NewArticles'\)

passed = 0
for e in feed.entries[:10]:
    if not scraper.editorial_filter\(e\):
        print\(f'FILTERED: {e.title[:60]}'\)
        continue
    result = scraper.scrape_article\(e.link, entry=e\)
    abstract = result['abstract']
    authors_leaked = abstract.lower\(\).startswith\('by '\)
    status = 'OK' if abstract and not authors_leaked else 'PROBLEM'
    print\(f'[{status}] {e.title[:60]}'\)
    if status == 'PROBLEM':
        print\(f'       abstract: {abstract[:100]}'\)
    passed += 1

print\(f'\\n{passed}/10 entries passed editorial filter'\)
")
